final:
module adder(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input [7:0] a,
    input [7:0] b,
    output reg [7:0] sum);

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset)
            sum <= 8'b0;
        else
            sum <= a + b;
    end
endmodule
